name: Crimson Shadows (Asym murder mystery)
description:
It was just an ordinary day for you, until Jonas invited you to his Mansion for a party, and You accepted, got dressed and arrived on the Mansion. And what'd ya know? Jonas' Mansion is large, its like straight out of a movie that you can see the Mansion with your own eyes
